title: Miniature bacta tank
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Easteregg}}
The '''miniature bacta tank''' was a miniature version of the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] [[Bacta tank/Legends|tank]] for use on localized injuries. It was used during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] troopers and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] on [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who were injured in battle and were not near a medical station. Miniature [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] tanks could have been installed on walls so that a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] or a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] could use it quickly and move on. That way it was quick and the next trooper could use it. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] found and used miniature bacta tanks during the Galactic Civil War.

==Behind the scenes==
Miniature bacta tanks serve as health packs in various [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s. They are often dropped by dead soldiers, [[Power droid/Legends|Ammunition droids]]/[[Engineer/Legends|engineers]], or are found throughout a level.
